scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/bwbasic-wasm && npm run build -w packages/retrobasic-wasm
scripts.build:wasm: npm run build:wasm -w packages/bwbasic-wasm && npm run build:wasm -w packages/retrobasic-wasm
scripts.test: npm run test:demo && npm run test:games && npm run test:integration && npm run test:bwbasic && npm run test:retrobasic && npm run test:packages
scripts.test:games: node test/basic101-wasm-smoke.mjs && node test/basic-computer-games-wasm-smoke.mjs && node test/23matches-coin-flip.mjs && node test/aceyducey-randomness.mjs && node test/hangman-interaction.mjs && node test/hammurabi-terminal.mjs
scripts.test:integration: node test/integration.mjs bwbasic && node test/integration.mjs retrobasic
scripts.test:retrobasic: npm run test -w packages/retrobasic-wasm && node test/retrobasic.mjs bwbasic && node test/retrobasic.mjs retrobasic
scripts.test:packages: npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/bwbasic-wasm && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/retrobasic-wasm
scripts.all: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run test
